title: [CODEREVIEW-6] Kconfig.defconfig uses incorrect BOARD_ symbol for ESP32-S3 variants
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/Kconfig.defconfig:3 - if BOARD_ELECROW_THINKNODE_M7 does not match BOARD_ELECROW_THINKNODE_M7_ESP32S3_PROCPU set by board.yml cpucluster variant. Heap and LICHEN_POE defaults not applied. See heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/Kconfig.defconfig for pattern. Priority correctness P1
